Release Notes 
Release notes record what has changed within the Respiratory Illnesses Data Channel since the last version. Check here to see what’s new, what’s fixed, and why it changed.
January 16, 2026 release 
1. Change in Age Group Reporting for Emergency Department Visit (NSSP) and Hospitalization (RESP-NET) Data
What:
NSSP Previously reported data for the following age groups: 
0-4 years 
5-17 years 
18-64 years 
65+ years 
RESP-NET previously reported data for the following age groups: 
0-4 years 
5-17 years 
18-49 years 
50-64 years 
65+ years 
Both NSSP and RESP-NET will now report data for the following age groups: 
<1 year 
1-4 years 
5-17 years 
18-49 years 
50-64 years 
65+ years 
Why:
The standardization of age group reporting by NSSP and RESP-NET creates consistency between data visualizations on the People Most Impacted Page under "By Age". This will improve readability and comparison between emergency department visits and hospitalizations.
